page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.r7 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides 128 vCPUs, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The memory configuration consists of 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. This 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions the instance as a memory-optimized resource. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

Given its high memory capacity and dedicated CPU cores, this server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It is suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and heavy data processing tasks that require substantial memory footprints without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and complex data processing pipelines that require high memory density and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high network bandwidth for demanding enterprise database workloads.

1024.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core resource density
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
